response:
## Bakerloo Line
The tour begins with the Bakerloo Line at 0:06. A sign for Embankment station is shown at 0:09, followed by a woman walking down the platform at 0:12 and a train pulling into the station at 1:08.

## Central Line
The Central Line section starts at 2:18. After a sign for Bethnal Green appears at 2:21, a train is seen coming down the tracks through a subway station at 2:24.

## Circle Line
The Circle Line is introduced at 4:38. A sign for Temple station is visible at 4:41, and a train is shown pulling passengers along the tracks at 4:45.

## District Line
The District Line begins at 5:49. A sign for Stepney Green is shown at 5:52, followed by a train pulling passengers in a subway station at 5:54.

## Hammersmith City Line
The Hammersmith City Line starts at 8:53. Another sign for Stepney Green appears at 8:57, and a train is seen pulling passengers at 9:00.

## Jubilee Line
The Jubilee Line section opens at 10:10. A sign for Cottage station is shown at 10:13, and a subway train is seen stopped at a station at 10:16.

## Metropolitan Line
The Metropolitan Line begins at 12:23. A sign for Finchley Road is displayed at 12:26, followed by a train pulling passengers at 12:30.

## Northern Line
The Northern Line starts at 14:57. A sign is shown at 15:00, followed by a man sitting on the floor at Charing Cross station at 15:06 and a train pulling passengers through a tunnel at 17:01.

## Piccadilly Line
The Piccadilly Line is introduced at 17:12. A sign for Finsbury Park appears at 17:15, and a train is seen pulling passengers at 17:19.

## Victoria Line
The Victoria Line begins at 19:44. A sign for Blackhorse Road is shown at 19:47, and a subway train is seen stopped at a station at 19:50.

## Waterloo City Line
The final line begins at 21:41. A sign for Waterloo is shown at 21:44, and the video concludes with a man in a suit waiting for a train at 21:46.
